occupation: Brand Marketing Manager OOH at Politis Group
headline: Brand Marketing Manager OOH
summary: Astounding marketing ideas that work. Every time.

experiences.title: Marketing Executive
experiences.description: -Corporate identity & branding (messaging, company values, brand image etc.) -Events - global and regional, internal and industry related (sponsorships, stands, speaking opportunities etc) -Public relations and analyst relations (thought leadership, opinion articles, issues hijack, success stories, case studies, white papers, press releases, interviews) -Marketing collateral (templates, presentations, videos, brochures, banners etc.) -Corporate website, social media, digital marketing (digital presence, targeted campaigns etc.) -Internal communications and CSR -Awards

experiences.title: Marketing Technologist
experiences.description: Customer loyalty management. IKEA, Marks & Spencer, Accessorize, Parabita, Yannis Lucacos. -Loyalty programs (designing the loyalty scheme, setting the processes for loyalty members’ acquisition and retainment) -Commercializing the loyalty program (branding, microsite specs, mobile app specs, sign up forms etc.) -Setting and managing the program's campaigns (monthly micro-selling calendar, events, mobile marketing, email newsletters, omnichannel, promotional mechanics etc.) -Customer intelligence, business Intelligence (big data analysis and reporting, RFM & MTV analysis, monitoring and optimisation)

education.school: Athens University of Economics and Business

recommendations:
Stavros Markoulakis

Archontissa is a wonderful colleague to be around and a dear friend. When I first joined Upstream, she vastly helped me adapt in the new environment and in working for the first time professionally in marketing communications. She was the kind of person that would help me balance my anxiety during these first months and show me that whatever problem came up was simpler to solve than I initially thought.She is a rare combination. She is simultaneously a very fun person, who can come up with ideas that will spark interest and trasmit positive energy to audiences, and someone with a top level business understanding, delving into the company's positioning and products, while keeping up to date with the latest market trends. She is also tech savvy and quick to catch up on working with new tools.A thing I have always admired in her, is the ability to visualize ideas. This allows her to create stunning marketing materials either completely on her own or by giving clear guidance to her partners. She has been exemplary on that front and I've been trying to follow in her footsteps to the best of my abilities.

Zozefina Paysanidou

Its rare that you come across standout talent like Archontissa.  I was always in awe of her ability to command a room and get people on board with ideas—even people who were initially on completely different pages. Any employee would be lucky to have Archontissa as a manager.
